title: Moderation update: recent abuse reports processed
body: We have processed several recent high-severity abuse reports. A phishing spam account (spam_wave_42) has been permanently banned for posting malicious links across multiple channels. A warning has been issued to toxic_runner for targeted harassment of newcomers; any further incidents may result in a ban. Reports against trusted contributors have been reviewed and closed as false positives. As always, thank you for continuing to report harmful content so we can keep this community safe.
